summary: Enrollment duplication prevention feature verified: Backend returns 409 for duplicate enrollments in regular classes, allows AEE enrollments with active regular enrollment. Frontend shows backend error messages and updates student list immediately after successful enrollment.
critical_code_review_comments: enrollments.py: Lines 33-67 - Proper duplicate check: first checks same class (409), then checks for active regular class enrollment (409 only if target is also regular)
enrollments.py: Lines 29-31 - turmas_especiais correctly defined as {'aee', 'recomposicao_aprendizagem', 'reforco_escolar'}
students.py: Lines 288-340 - PUT endpoint has same duplicate logic for 'matricular' action via student update
StudentsComplete.js: Lines 926-935 - Immediate local state update (setStudents, setFormData, setEditingStudent) after successful action
StudentsComplete.js: Lines 958-959 - Shows backend error message directly: error?.response?.data?.detail
Enrollments.js: Line 161 - Same error handling pattern for direct enrollment creation
server.py: Lines 144-149 - MongoDB partial unique index on enrollments (student_id, class_id, academic_year) where status=active
seed_data_creation: Test students created with prefix TEST_DUPLICIDADE_ and TEST_AEE_UPDATE_ (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enrollment duplication prevention is fully implemented and tested. Key test data: TURMA MULTI 1-2-3 (id=c09b8666-c8bb-40d1-b835-c2b0fa4b8ecd, regular class), TESTE 2 (id=e37025d4-52a9-40f7-89b6-2a9789c9f266, regular class), AEE (id=73844918-60b1-4c62-b6cb-a21a35cc49c1, turma especial). School: 220d4022-ec5e-4fb6-86fc-9233112b87b2.

backend_api.POST /api/enrollments (duplicate same cl: PASS - Returns 409 with message 'já está matriculado nesta turma'
backend_api.POST /api/enrollments (duplicate another: PASS - Returns 409 with message 'já possui matrícula ativa na turma regular'
backend_api.PUT /api/students/{id} (matricular regul: PASS - Creates enrollment in different class
backend_api.PUT /api/students/{id} (matricular AEE): PASS - Creates AEE enrollment with active regular
backend_api.Error message quality: PASS - Messages include turma name and are user-friendly

frontend_ui_flow.student_modal_tabs: PASS - All 6 tabs present (Identificação, Documentos, Responsáveis, Info. Complementares, Anexos, Turma/Observações)
frontend_ui_flow.turma_observacoes_tab: PASS - Shows Vínculo com Turma, Matrícula em Atendimento/Programa, Histórico do Aluno
frontend_ui_flow.immediate_list_update: PASS - setStudents updates local state immediately (line 932-934)
